_readme: Optional minimal permissions for a pre-authorized A2A listener session. Merge only the exact entries you need into .claude/settings.json after explicit user approval.
_security_context: Default to local/self-hosted brokers. Remote brokers must be configured explicitly via A2A_BASE_URL or A2A_SERVER for the session.
_security_note: These entries authorize local transport scripts only. In supervisor-based unattended flows, the local policy layer still governs runner invocation. This template does not by itself grant general filesystem or arbitrary network access.
